head_commit.message:
fix(windows): synchronize UI settings with core registry variables
- Update MainControlDialog and TrayPopover to read/write from/to vBellInterval, vLanguage, vSwitchKeyStatus.
- Update CHANGELOG.md for v0.4.2 release.
